message:
feat(server,command,runtime): add write propagation to replicas and expand command key indexing

fr-server: Add replication_sent_offset tracking per client connection
for connected replicas. Add propagate_writes_to_replicas() that delivers
pending AOF stream bytes to replica clients whose offset is behind the
primary. Wire into main event loop. Add fr-repl and fr-persist as
server dependencies.

fr-command: Expand command_key_indexes() with proper key extraction for
XSETID, RESTORE, ZUNION/ZINTER/ZDIFF/ZINTERCARD/SINTERCARD (numkeys-
prefixed), and SINTERSTORE/SUNIONSTORE/SDIFFSTORE (destination + sources).

fr-runtime: Add replication_primary_offset() and is_replica() accessors.
Expand keyspace notification type detection with blocking list commands
(BLMOVE, BRPOPLPUSH, BLPOP, BRPOP, LMPOP, BLMPOP) and blocking sorted
set commands (ZMPOP, BZMPOP, BZPOPMIN, BZPOPMAX). Skip AOF capture for
special commands that record themselves.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
